glosses.ja: 資金を提供する; 資金援助する

translations.en: I have to finance my studies.
translations.he: אני צריך לממן את הלימודים שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi phải tự trang trải tiền học.
translations.hu: Nekem kell állnom a tanulmányaim költségeit.
translations.hi: मुझे अपनी पढ़ाई का खर्च खुद उठाना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να καλύψω τα έξοδα των σπουδών μου.
translations.da: Jeg er nødt til selv at betale for min uddannelse.
translations.ja: 自分で学費をまかなわないといけない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person singular present indicative; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Studium' (neuter, singular, accusative); attributes possession.
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'finanzieren'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive form; complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Wir wollen den Urlaub über einen Kredit finanzieren.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən deːn ˈʊʁlaʊ̯p ˈyːbɐ ˈaɪ̯nən kʁeˈdiːt fɪnanˈtsiːʁən/

translations.de: Wir wollen den Urlaub über einen Kredit finanzieren.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən deːn ˈʊʁlaʊ̯p ˈyːbɐ ˈaɪ̯nən kʁeˈdiːt fɪnanˈtsiːʁən/
translations.en: We want to finance the vacation with a loan.
translations.es: Queremos pagar las vacaciones con un préstamo.
translations.fr: Nous voulons financer nos vacances avec un crédit.
translations.it: Vogliamo pagare le vacanze con un prestito.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想用贷款来支付假期费用。
translations.yue: 我哋想用貸款嚟支付旅費。
translations.ru: Мы хотим оплатить отпуск с помощью кредита.
translations.pt: Queremos pagar as férias com um empréstimo.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לממן את החופשה בעזרת הלוואה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn dùng khoản vay để chi trả kỳ nghỉ.
translations.nl: We willen de vakantie betalen met een lening.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо оплатити відпустку за допомогою кредиту.
translations.hi: हम छुट्टी का खर्च कर्ज से चुकाना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να καλύψουμε τα έξοδα των διακοπών με δάνειο.
translations.nb: Vi vil betale ferien med et lån.
translations.id: Kami ingin membayar liburan dengan pinjaman.
translations.sv: Vi vill betala semestern med ett lån.
translations.ro: Vrem să plătim vacanța cu un împrumut.
translations.da: Vi vil betale ferien med et lån.
translations.ja: 休暇の費用をローンでまかないたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person plural present indicative; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; determiner of 'Urlaub'.
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; direct object of 'finanzieren'.
Preposition governing accusative here; introduces a means/instrument PP.
Indefinite article, masculine singular accusative; determiner of 'Kredit'.
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; object of the preposition 'über' (means).
Lexical verb in bare infinitive form; complement of the modal 'wollen'.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern können mir die Miete finanzieren.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn ˈkœnən miːɐ̯ diː ˈmiːtə fɪnanˈtsiːʁən/

translations.de: Meine Eltern können mir die Miete finanzieren.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn ˈkœnən miːɐ̯ diː ˈmiːtə fɪnanˈtsiːʁən/
translations.en: My parents can finance my rent.
translations.es: Mis padres pueden pagarme el alquiler.
translations.fr: Mes parents peuvent payer mon loyer.
translations.it: I miei genitori possono pagarmi l'affitto.
translations.ko: 부모님이 내 월세를 내줄 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我父母可以帮我付房租。
translations.ru: Мои родители могут оплачивать мне аренду.
translations.pt: Meus pais podem pagar meu aluguel.
translations.he: ההורים שלי יכולים לשלם לי את שכר הדירה.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi có thể trả tiền thuê nhà cho tôi.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders kunnen mijn huur betalen.
translations.uk: Мої батьки можуть оплачувати мою оренду.
translations.hu: A szüleim ki tudják fizetni a lakbéremet.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता मेरा किराया दे सकते हैं.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice mogą opłacić mi czynsz.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου μπορούν να πληρώσουν το ενοίκιό μου.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine kan betale husleien min.
translations.id: Orang tua saya bisa membayar sewa saya.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar kan betala min hyra.
translations.ro: Părinții mei îmi pot plăti chiria.
translations.da: Mine forældre kan betale min husleje.
translations.ja: 親が私の家賃を払える。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative plural agreeing with 'Eltern'; attributes possession.
Common plural-only noun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person plural present indicative; selects a bare infinitive complement.
1st person singular personal pronoun in dative; indirect object/beneficiary.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Miete'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object (theme) of 'finanzieren'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive form; complement of the modal 'können'.

sentences.target: Der Verein will das Turnier finanzieren.

translations.de: Der Verein will das Turnier finanzieren.
translations.en: The club wants to finance the tournament.
translations.es: El club quiere financiar el torneo.
translations.fr: Le club veut financer le tournoi.
translations.it: Il club vuole finanziare il torneo.
translations.zh-Hans: 俱乐部想承担比赛的费用。
translations.pt: O clube quer financiar o torneio.
translations.vi: Câu lạc bộ muốn tài trợ cho giải đấu.
translations.nl: De club wil het toernooi financieren.
translations.hu: A klub szeretné finanszírozni a tornát.
translations.hi: क्लब टूर्नामेंट का खर्च उठाना चाहता है.
translations.el: Ο σύλλογος θέλει να χρηματοδοτήσει το τουρνουά.
translations.ja: クラブは大会の費用を負担したいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular nominative; determiner of 'Verein'.
Common noun, masculine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present indicative; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article, neuter singular accusative; determiner of 'Turnier'.
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'finanzieren'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive form; complement of the modal 'will' (wollen).
